title: Hide n' Seek...
description: Horror ModPack including the Playmate Mod (Hide and Seek).
body:
In this ModPack,\
You will be hunted, or hunting, every 3 days...\
Prepare.

At any time during that day,\
Something, or someone, will appear.\
Be ready, and remember the number **3**.

**It** might spook you but you got to survive.\
Never let **it** find you.

Features:

- Hide And Seek
- Great Terrain
- Jumpscares
- And More!

For any help or bug reports, join my discord using this link: https://discord.gg/C9b3anUaP9
